ccel.title: NPNF1-03. On the Holy Trinity; Doctrinal Treatises; Moral Treatises

source.title: NPNF1-03. On the Holy Trinity; Doctrinal Treatises; Moral Treatises
NPNF1-03. On the Holy Trinity; Doctrinal Treatises; Moral Treatises

verses.text: He was in office as governor and was the judge, this same Pontius Pilate, what time as Christ suffered.
In the name of the judge there is a mark of the times, when He suffered under Pontius Pilate: when He suffered, “was crucified, dead, and buried.”
For whom? for ungodly and sinners.
“What shall I render unto the Lord for all that He hath bestowed on me?”
